eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Ouray, CO; at 4:40 PM on JUN 30, 2026 Effective until 8:40 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Ouray County Sheriff - Gold Mtn Fire EVACUATION ORDER in effect for the area East of US 550 north of County Road (CR) 8 and south of CR 8A east to the US Forest boundary south to CR8 B along Cow Creek. Anyone in this area should EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY DUE TO RAPID FIRE GROWTH.  DO NOT DELAY. Evacuation Map available at: OurayCountyCO.gov or call 970-626-5484 The Ouray County Sheriffs Office is issuing a MANDATORY EVACUATION ORDER for the area east of US 550 north of CR 8 and south of CR 8A east to the US Forest Service Boundary and south to CR8 along Cow Creek. ANYONE IN THIS AREA SHOULD EVACUATE NOW.  DO NOT DELAY. There is a rapidly growing wildfire in the area. You are in danger. View the Evacuation map for zones in Evacuation Order at OurayCountyCO.gov or call 970-626-5484.
